# Le Filon — lefilon.net

## What is this site?
Le Filon is a market research platform that identifies business opportunities hidden in French open data (data.gouv.fr). It analyzes public datasets to find viable SaaS product ideas.

## Content
- 16 sector analyses (real estate, energy, health, education, disability, etc.)
- 85 detailed product ideas with execution plans
- Each product has: market validation, viability scoring, competitor analysis, legal constraints, path to 10K MRR
- All data sourced from data.gouv.fr (French government open data portal)

## Structure
- / — Homepage with all opportunities overview
- /opportunites/[slug] — Detailed sector analysis with SWOT, personas, datasets, APIs
- /produits/[slug] — Individual product idea with full execution plan

## Key data points
- Datasets: visits and downloads from data.gouv.fr API (verified)
- Market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM): estimated from public statistics
- Competitor pricing: researched from public pricing pages (March 2026)
- Search volumes: estimated without professional SEO tools
- CAC estimates: based on SaaS benchmarks (not field-tested)

## Confidence levels
Each data point is tagged: "verifie" (verified public source), "estime" (calculated estimate), or "opine" (expert opinion).

## Language
All content is in French. The site targets French entrepreneurs and developers.

## Contact
Site owner: Tristan de Broise
